description_long: This is a modern, single-story bungalow enclosed by a dark perimeter fence, featuring a flat roof and a minimalist rectangular layout. The front facade includes a covered porch area with wooden accents and large glass doors opening to a spacious patio. The backyard boasts a rectangular swimming pool, two palm trees, and a paved lounging area with sunbeds. The landscaping is simple, with manicured grass patches and a few ornamental trees, including two with pink blossoms near the entrance. The exterior walls are finished in a combination of neutral gray and wood paneling, giving the structure a contemporary aesthetic. The windows are large, horizontally oriented, and asymmetrically arranged, providing ample natural light to the interior.
description: A modern, single-story bungalow with a flat roof, large glass doors, a pool, and minimalist landscaping within a fenced lot.
description_view_0: View 0 shows the front and left side of the bungalow, highlighting the pool, patio, palm trees, and the main entrance with a covered porch.
description_view_1: View 1 presents the front gate, driveway, and the main entrance flanked by two pink-blossomed trees, with the pool area partially visible.
description_view_2: View 2 displays the rear and right side, emphasizing the long, windowed wall and the backyard landscaping.
description_view_3: View 3 focuses on the back and left side, showing the pool, sunbeds, and the covered patio area adjacent to the house.
